description: Per-volume Portworx capacity, HA level, status, and utilization via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Per-volume metrics from px_volume_capacity_bytes, px_volume_halevel, px_volume_status, and px_volume_used_bytes. Available bytes and utilization percentage computed from capacity and used bytes. Discovery extracts volumeid and volumename labels from px_volume_capacity_bytes.
name: Portworx_Volume_Health
